title: Privacy policy
description: How personal data and initial clinical context are processed.
heading: Privacy policy
summary: Contact data and initial clinical context are processed for care, operations, and support purposes.

highlights.title: We request only what is needed for booking, support, and continuity.
highlights.body: Name, contact data, concern, images, and payment evidence are used according to the current step.

highlights.title: Information exists to coordinate care, not to recycle it outside the case.
highlights.body: It is used to validate availability, prepare the appointment, and sustain follow-up.

sections.title: What we process
sections.body: The site may process contact data, initial clinical context, appointment preferences, and supporting images.
items: Contact data for confirmation and follow-up.
Initial clinical context to orient the first consultation.
Minimum technical metadata for security and operations.

sections.title: How it is used
sections.body: Information supports availability, response, appointment preparation, and care continuity.
items: WhatsApp or telemedicine support when appropriate.
Fraud prevention and operational error reduction.
